name: Cheese-Bacon Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove bacon from drippings.
2. Add vegetables to bacon drippings and cook until tender.
3. Blend in flour, salt, and pepper; stir well.
4. Gradually stir in half-and-half, milk, and chicken broth. Cover and cook until thickened and bubbly, stirring occasionally.
5. Add cheese, stirring until melted. Top each serving with bacon.
